metadata.description: Pavel Zloi's agent-skills collection for Cursor, Claude Code, OpenAI Codex, Kimi Code CLI and other agents.

plugins.name: rpa-init
plugins.description: Warm up context on a repository: study code, docs and tests, set up the dev environment, run tests, write a short report. No extra brief required.

plugins.name: rpa-gen-rules
plugins.description: Create or refresh agent project rules (Cursor .mdc, Claude Code .claude/rules). Layered-cake architecture + BDD, with a mandatory Rules Sync step across agent trees.

plugins.name: rpa-feat
plugins.description: Add a feature strictly by BDD: plan, red tests, green implementation, full suite, docs and examples, linter at the end. Requires a clear feature description.

plugins.name: rpa-bugfix
plugins.description: Fix a bug with a reproduction test first, then the fix, then the full suite, then a short report. Requires a clear bug description.

plugins.name: logika
plugins.description: Classical formal logic from G. Chelpanov's textbook: concepts, judgments, syllogisms, induction, fallacies, laws of thought.

plugins.name: token-cost
plugins.description: Estimate the floor (self-) cost of a self-hosted LLM token: electricity + hardware amortization, measured on the server. Not the market API price.
